name: Azelaic Acid
description: Azelaic acid is a naturally occurring dicarboxylic acid that targets both acne and hyperpigmentation simultaneously. It inhibits tyrosinase to fade dark spots, kills acne-causing bacteria, and gently exfoliates without the irritation of stronger acids. It is one of the few active ingredients considered safe during pregnancy.

relatedProducts.name: Beauty of Joseon Glow Serum Propolis + Niacinamide
